hypotheses:
SUBSET : forall (p : frm L) (_ : E.In p Gamma),
ex (fun p' : frm L => and (alpha_equiv p p') (E.In p' Gamma'))

proofs: destruct PROVE as [ps [Hsub Hproof]]. induction ps as [|p ps IH].

hypotheses:
SUBSET : forall (p : frm L) (_ : E.In p Gamma),
ex (fun p' : frm L => and (alpha_equiv p p') (E.In p' Gamma'))

IH : forall (_ : E.isSubsetOf (E.fromList ps) Gamma)
  (_ : inhabited (proof ps C)), proves Gamma' C

SUBSET : forall (p : frm L) (_ : E.In p Gamma),
ex (fun p' : frm L => and (alpha_equiv p p') (E.In p' Gamma'))

attempts:
destruct PROVE as [ps [Hsub Hproof]]. induction ps as [|p ps IH].
- exists []; split; [intros x Hx; inversion Hx | exact Hproof].
- destruct (IH (fun p' Hp' => SUBSET p' (Hsub p' (or_intror Hp')))) as [ps' [Hforge Hmem]]. destruct (SUBSET p (Hsub p (or_introl eq_refl))) as [q [Halpha Hq]]. destruct Hproof as [prf]. exists (q :: ps'); split.
